summary: Backend smoke test of 23 checks across auth, bookings, inventory, expenses, dashboard, pricing AI, alloggiati, iCal. 22/23 passed. Only failure: /api/pricing/suggest returns 500 because EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget is exhausted (litellm.BadRequestError: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'). The code path is correct; it's an external key/budget issue.
passed: POST /api/auth/login admin@bnb.it/admin123 -> 200, returns user, sets httpOnly access_token+refresh_token cookies
GET /api/auth/me with cookies -> 200 returns admin user
POST /api/auth/register with unique email -> 200 with tokens; duplicate email -> 400 'Email già registrata'
POST /api/bookings computes nights=3 correctly; net_revenue math verified for all 3 channels: Airbnb (gross*0.97*0.79 = 229.89), Booking (gross*0.85*0.79 = 134.30), Direct (gross*0.79 = 79.00)
Expenses POST creates fixed expense; PUT with paid=true toggles successfully
GET /api/alloggiati/preview returns records with total count
GET /api/alloggiati/export returns text/plain with Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="alloggiati_...txt"
POST /api/bookings/ical-import with invalid URL -> 400 with 'Impossibile leggere iCal' message

failed.issue: Endpoint returns 500. Backend log shows litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env (sk-emergent-c83F86643E8Ad76028) has zero budget allocated, so the Claude Sonnet 4.5 call cannot execute.
failed.evidence: Request: POST /api/pricing/suggest {checkin:'2025-08-15',checkout:'2025-08-18',location:'Roma',base_price:90}. Response: 500 'Errore AI: ... Budget has been exceeded'. Stacktrace in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log at server.py:429 chat.send_message.

action_items: The AI pricing endpoint code is correct (LlmChat + claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 + JSON parsing) but the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY has Max budget: 0.0. Main agent should request a new/funded EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (or top up budget) and update /app/backend/.env, then retest /api/pricing/suggest to confirm real Claude JSON response (suggested_price, min_price, max_price, reasoning, nights, total_suggested).
